package main

import (
	context "context"
	reflect "reflect"

	gomock "go.uber.org/mock/gomock"
)

// MockUserRepository is a mock of UserRepository interface.
type MockUserRepository struct {
	ctrl     *gomock.Controller
	recorder *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder
}

type MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder struct {
	mock *MockUserRepository
}

func NewMockUserRepository(ctrl *gomock.Controller) *MockUserRepository {
	mock := &MockUserRepository{ctrl: ctrl}
	mock.recorder = &MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder{mock}
	return mock
}

func (m *MockUserRepository) EXPECT() *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder {
	return m.recorder
}

func (m *MockUserRepository) Get(ctx context.Context, id string) (*User, error) {
	ret := m.ctrl.Call(m, "Get", ctx, id)
	ret0, _ := ret[0].(*User)
	ret1, _ := ret[1].(error)
	return ret0, ret1
}

func (mr *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder) Get(ctx, id any) *gomock.Call {
	return mr.mock.ctrl.RecordCall(mr.mock, "Get", ctx, id)
}

func (m *MockUserRepository) Save(ctx context.Context, user *User) error {
	ret := m.ctrl.Call(m, "Save", ctx, user)
	ret0, _ := ret[0].(error)
	return ret0
}

func (mr *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder) Save(ctx, user any) *gomock.Call {
	return mr.mock.ctrl.RecordCall(mr.mock, "Save", ctx, user)
}

func (m *MockUserRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
	ret := m.ctrl.Call(m, "Delete", ctx, id)
	ret0, _ := ret[0].(error)
	return ret0
}

func (mr *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder) Delete(ctx, id any) *gomock.Call {
	return mr.mock.ctrl.RecordCall(mr.mock, "Delete", ctx, id)
}

func (m *MockUserRepository) List(ctx context.Context) ([]*User, error) {
	ret := m.ctrl.Call(m, "List", ctx)
	ret0, _ := ret[0].([]*User)
	ret1, _ := ret[1].(error)
	return ret0, ret1
}

func (mr *MockUserRepositoryMockRecorder) List(ctx any) *gomock.Call {
	return mr.mock.ctrl.RecordCall(mr.mock, "List", ctx)
}

	ctrl     *gomock.Controller

	mock *MockNotificationService
}

	mock := &MockNotificationService{ctrl: ctrl}
	mock.recorder = &MockNotificationServiceMockRecorder{mock}
	return mock
}

	return m.recorder
}
